title: Prompt Compression
code:
def compress_tokens(tokens, self_entropies, threshold=1.0):
    return [t for i, t in enumerate(tokens) if self_entropies[i] > threshold]

def run_practice():
    tokens = ['the', 'anomaly', 'detected']
    entropies = [0.1, 2.5, 3.0]
    compressed = compress_tokens(tokens, entropies, 1.0)
    assert 'the' not in compressed
    assert 'anomaly' in compressed
    print('[PASS] Token entropy compression checks passed.')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    run_practice()
